person.name: Duque Guillermo VIII de Aquitania

burialPlace.address: Poitiers, Departement de la Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, France

person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
geni.com
Guillaume VIII Geoffroy d'Aquitaine, VIII duc d'Aquitaine et Vl comte de Poitou
French: Guy Geoffroy d'Aquitaine, VIII duc d'Aquitaine et Vl comte de Poitou
Also Known As:	"dit"Guillaume""
Birthdate:	1023
Birthplace:	Aquitaine, France
Death:	September 25, 1086 (62-63)
Chizé, Deux-Sevres, Poitou-Charentes, France 
Place of Burial:	France
Immediate Family:	
Son of William V, duke of Aquitaine and Agnes of Burgundy
Husband of Hildegarde of Burgundy and Mathilde
Ex-husband of Aina de Périgord

 of Guillaume IX le Troubadour, duc d'Aquitaine; Agnes of Poitou; Hugues, infant d’Aquitaine; Beatrix de Aquitania, Reina consorte de León and Inés de Aquitania

Brother of Pierre Guillaume 'l'Aigret' ou 'le Hardi' d'Aquitaine, VII Duc d'Aquitaine, V Comte de Poitou and Agnes of Poitou

Half brother of Guillaume le Gros, VI duc d'Aquitaine et comte IV de Poitiers; Adelais de Fezensac; Odo (Eudes) d'Aquitaine, Duc d'Aquitaine & Gascogne, comte de Poitou and Thibault Of Aquitaine


Occupation:	Duke of Aquitaine, COUNT OF AQUITAINE VIII AND POITOU VI, Duc d'Aquitaine, Conde de Poitiers e Duque da Aquitania, Hertug, Duc, d'Aquitaine, Comte, de Gascogne, de Bordeaux, d'Agen, de Poitou, Duke, Duke of Gascony, Count of Poitiers, 13ème Duc d'Aqu…

zh.lifeSummary: 當Duque Guillermo VIII de Aquitania於1025年出生在法國阿奎泰時，他的父親duc William d'Aquitaine V56歲，母親Agnes of Burgundy30歲。他和Duquesa Hildegarda de Borgoña至少有2個兒子。他去世於1086年9月25日在法國努維勒-阿吉泰多武-瑟艾福雷斯澤享年61歲，埋葬在法國波特-哈倫斯維安波爾斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Guillermo
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: VIII
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Feminine pet form of   Vivien   and   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Duque Guillermo VIII de Aquitania was born in 1025, in Aquitaine, France, his father, duc William d'Aquitaine V, was 56 and his mother, Agnes of Burgundy, was 30. He had at least 2 sons with Duquesa Hildegarda de Borgoña. He died on 25 September 1086, in Chizé, Deux-Sèvres, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, at the age of 61, and was buried in Poitiers, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, France.

fr.Maillezais,Vendée,Pays de la Loire,Frank: Maillezais, Vendée, Pays de la Loire, France
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Duque Guillermo VIII de Aquitania est né en 1025, à Aquitaine, France, son père, duc William d'Aquitaine V, avait 56 ans et sa mère, Agnes of Burgundy, avait 30 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils avec Duquesa Hildegarda de Borgoña. Il est décédé le 25 septembre 1086, à Chizé, Deux-Sèvres, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterré à Poitiers, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, France.

de.Maillezais,Vendée,Pays de la Loire,Frank: Maillezais, Vendée, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich
de.lifeSummary: Als Duque Guillermo VIII de Aquitania 1025 in Aquitaine, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater duc William d'Aquitaine V 56 und seine Mutter Agnes of Burgundy 30. Er hatte mit Duquesa Hildegarda de Borgoña mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb am 25. September 1086 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Chizé, Deux-Sèvres, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich und wurde in Poitiers, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Duque Guillermo VIII de Aquitania è nato il nel 1025 nel Aquitaine, Francia, il suo padre, duc William d'Aquitaine V, aveva 56 anni e il suo madre, Agnes of Burgundy, aveva 30 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli con Duquesa Hildegarda de Borgoña. Morì il 25 settembre 1086, nel Chizé, Deux-Sèvres, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolto a Poitiers, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, Francia.

ko.lifeSummary: Duque Guillermo VIII de Aquitania(이)가 1025년 프랑스 아키테인에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 duc William d'Aquitaine V(은)는 56세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes of Burgundy(은)는 30세였다. 그는 Duquesa Hildegarda de Borgoña(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1086년 9월 25일 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 데우스-스e브레스 치즈e에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 포이토우-처츠 비니 포이티어스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Duque Guillermo VIII de Aquitania nasceu em 1025, em Aquitaine, França, seu pai, duc William d'Aquitaine V, tinha 56 anos e sua mãe, Agnes of Burgundy, tinha 30 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos com Duquesa Hildegarda de Borgoña. Ele faleceu em 25 de setembro de 1086, em Chizé, Deux-Sèvres, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França, com 61 anos, e foi sepultado em Poitiers, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, França.

ru.Maillezais,Vendée,Pays de la Loire,Frank: меиллезеи, вендe, пеис де ла лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Duque Guillermo VIII de Aquitania родился в 1025 г. в местности аквитеин, Франция, его отцу по имени duc William d'Aquitaine V было 56 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes of Burgundy, 30. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына от Duquesa Hildegarda de Borgoña. Он умер 25 сентября 1086 г. в местности чизe, деукс-сeвресь, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция в возрасте 61 год и был похоронен в местности поитиирс, виенн, поитоу-чарентесь, Франция.
